name: Spaced Repetition
what_it_is: Scheduling review of material at increasing intervals based on recall difficulty - maximizing retention with minimum time.
core_mechanic: Review at day 1, 3, 7, 14, 30+. Material recalled easily gets longer intervals. Struggled material gets shorter. Works for any retrievable knowledge.
when_to_use: Large body of facts or concepts needing long-term retention / High-stakes tests or certifications / Building fluency requiring fast retrieval
when_not_to_use: Conceptual/relational knowledge requiring understanding not memorization / Application practice more valuable than recall / Short-term cramming
ideaos_application: Agent 3 identifies which components require retention vs. understanding vs. application, prescribes the right method for each.
